title: Evangelion GREE Mobile Game
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion GREE Mobile Game             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 28, 2012 12:15 pm http://entersphere.co.jp/press/press_release_2010_08_05.html This is a free to play Mobile/cell phone game although certain things you have to pay for. GREE membership registration is required. More info here http://17th-angel.tumblr.com/post/18441971387/evangelion-kizuna (No it's obviously not that free web browser game , it's something different.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 02, 2012 9:56 am Apparently this is another mobile(?) game, it's RPG based: http://pf.gree.jp/46263 The title ("Evangelion: Absolute Defense") makes me think it's a tower defense game.
